pr_metadata.title: fix(web_ui): chunking, keyword, conversation, budget, embedder worker, air-gap hardening, eval harness (Issue #37 PR-2)
pr_metadata.author: zaxbysauce
body_claims: R4: keyword search tokenize:full→forward, stopword filter, strict-first+fallback
R5: chunking — unbounded-chunk fix, overlap 100→32, token-cap governor, PDF struct, XLSX headers, empty-chunk guard, query-time dedup
R6: conversation context — history turns, contextualized query, browser + server paths
R7: budget coherence — CHARS_PER_TOKEN 4→3.7, TEMPLATE_OVERHEAD_TOKENS=32, IMAGE_TOKEN_ESTIMATE=512, contextTrimmed UI
R8: embedder q8 + Web Worker — q8 dtype, VECTOR_INDEX_VERSION 2→3, embedding.worker.ts, thread cap 4→6, dead-code deletion
P1: CI smoke — smoke-coop-coep.mjs, wired into web-ui.yml
P2: air-gap build flag — VITE_AIRGAP=1, tree-shakes web-llm, build:airgap, validate-build --airgap
P5: storage hygiene — persist(), Clear Cache updates, duplicate-guard.ts
§5: eval harness — eval-harness.test.ts, run-eval.mjs, eval.jsonl corpus
review_trail: Implementation reviewer: NEEDS_REVISION → fixed (JSONL, run-eval README, airgap check, airgap.ts comment, 1 FP about smoke CI wiring)
Final critic: NEEDS_REVISION → fixed (contextTrimmed onDone, IsolationBanner mount, R6 wiring, build:airgap invoke)
